q: Anak 10 tahun, kuning mulai mata ke badan. Teman-teman mengalami keluhan serupa. Pemeriksaan fisik: ikterus, hepar 3x2x2 cm, demam 3 hari, mual, muntah. Diagnosis?
e: Hepatitis A Akut: KHAS = wabah (teman-teman juga sakit = kluster komunitas/sekolah) + ikterus akut + hepatomegali + dema

q: Bayi usia 8 bulan, diare berulang pasca diare akut. Tinja banyak, cair, asam, frekuensi sering. Diagnosis?
e: Intoleransi Laktosa Post-infektif: pasca diare akut (rotavirus/bakteri) ke kerusakan vili usus ke defisiensi laktase sem

q: Demam tifoid menular melalui cara?
e: Demam Tifoid (Salmonella typhi/paratyphi): penularan FECAL-ORAL - melalui makanan/minuman yang terkontaminasi feses/urin

q: Perbedaan mendasar antara DBD dan demam dengue adalah?
e: PEREMBESAN PLASMA adalah perbedaan fundamental dan kriteria utama membedakan DBD dari demam dengue.

q: Manifestasi klinis pada mukosa dan kulit yang spesifik untuk penyakit campak adalah?
e: Koplik Spots adalah PATOGNOMONIK (khas hanya untuk) campak.

q: Pada Stevens-Johnson Syndrome, manifestasi kulit yang spesifik adalah?
e: Eritema multiforme adalah lesi kulit khas Stevens-Johnson Syndrome (SJS).

q: Di antara gejala berikut, yang paling mengarah ke asma adalah?
e: MENGI (Wheezing) adalah gejala yang paling spesifik untuk asma.

q: Penyakit yang disebabkan oleh kuman dengan penularan melalui fecal-oral adalah?
e: Hepatitis A: penularan klasik fecal-oral melalui air/makanan yang terkontaminasi.

q: Pada glomerulonefritis pasca streptococcus (GNAPS), penanda laboratorium yang mendukung adalah?
e: GNAPS: penurunan kadar KOMPLEMEN C3 adalah penanda laboratorium khas yang mendukung diagnosis.

q: Penyebab anemia pada gagal ginjal kronik adalah?
e: Anemia pada Gagal Ginjal Kronik (GGK): penyebab UTAMA = gangguan produksi ERITROPOIETIN (EPO).

q: Penyebab bronkiolitis terbanyak adalah?
e: RSV (Respiratory Syncytial Virus) adalah penyebab bronkiolitis tersering (50-80% kasus), terutama pada bayi <2 tahun.

q: Keadaan yang menyebabkan napas Kussmaul adalah?
e: Napas Kussmaul: napas dalam dan cepat (hiperpnea) sebagai kompensasi asidosis metabolik.

q: Bayi 6 bulan, demam, sesak, batuk, sulit napas, perkusi pekak di basal paru kanan posterior, suara napas bronkial. Diagnosis?
e: Pneumonia: demam + sesak + batuk + PERKUSI PEKAK (konsolidasi) + suara napas BRONKIAL (hantaran suara melalui jaringan y

q: Bayi laki-laki 1 tahun, batuk, mengi, sianosis, kesulitan bernapas, retraksi intercostal. Kondisi yang paling mungkin?
e: Bronkiolitis: usia 1 tahun + batuk + MENGI (wheeze) + retraksi + sesak.

q: Bayi perempuan 9 bulan, lelah, suara berat, batuk menggonggong, stridor, demam ringan. Diagnosis?
e: Croup (Laryngotracheobronchitis): usia 6 bulan - 3 tahun (puncak 1-2 tahun) + batuk menggonggong (barking cough) + strid

q: Anak 2 tahun menderita cacar air dengan defisiensi imun, terapi yang tepat?
e: Varicella (cacar air) pada anak imunokompromais: ASIKLOVIR IV dosis tinggi (10 mg/kgBB/dosis tiap 8 jam) adalah terapi u

q: Anak dengan ruam makulopapular diawali dari kepala ke seluruh tubuh disertai demam. Diagnosis?
e: Campak (Morbili) - ruam cephalocaudal (mulai kepala ke leher ke badan ke ekstremitas) adalah ciri khas campak.

q: A 8 months old baby had high temperature for 10 hours followed by a 2 minutes tonic clonic generalized seizure. Right ear secretion discovered, no more seizures occurred. Diagnosis?
e: Kejang Demam SEDERHANA: (1) usia 6 bulan-5 tahun, (2) kejang tonik-klonik umum, (3) durasi <15 menit (2 menit = singkat)

q: A neonate born at 37 weeks with birth weight 2700 gr. Parents brought the neonate for routine visit at 1 month of age. What is the minimum current body weight expected?
e: Pertumbuhan berat badan bayi bulan pertama: bayi kembali ke BB lahir pada usia 10-14 hari, lalu tumbuh rata-rata 25-30 g

q: You manage a neonate with PDA and expect the closure with non invasive procedure. What do you choose to accelerate the closure?
e: IBUPROFEN (atau Indometasin) adalah terapi farmakologis lini pertama untuk menutup PDA pada bayi prematur.

q: You suspect PDA when assessing a newborn infant. You associated your conclusion with the gestational age of the infant at?
e: PDA paling sering dan paling signifikan secara klinis pada bayi PREMATUR SANGAT AWAL yaitu usia gestasi <32 minggu.

q: A posyandu provider reports a boy aged 4 years with WFA <-2 SD, HFA <-3 SD, WFH >+2 SD. Conclusion regarding nutritional status?
e: Interpretasi indikator gizi WHO: (1) HFA (TB/U) <-3 SD = SEVERELY STUNTED. (2) WFH (BB/TB) >+2 SD = OBESE.

q: Which birthweight carries the highest potential risk for iron deficiency anemia before age 2 years?
e: BBLR (<2500 gram) memiliki risiko tertinggi anemia defisiensi besi sebelum usia 2 tahun karena: (1) Cadangan besi janin

q: You meet a 3 years old boy with body weight below -2 SD. This malnutrition is associated with imbalance of nutritional?
e: Malnutrisi didefinisikan sebagai ketidakseimbangan antara KEBUTUHAN (needs) dan ASUPAN (intake) nutrisi.

q: A 12 years-old female came to ER with soporo-comatous consciousness, tachypnea and deep breathing. Random blood glucose 600 mg/dL. Most likely diagnosis?
e: KAD (Ketoasidosis Diabetikum): Triad diagnostik = (1) Hiperglikemia berat GDS 600 mg/dL (>250 mg/dL batas DKA), (2) Asid

q: A mother asks about weaning preparation as her baby almost reaches 6 months exclusive breastfeeding. What is the most important concept in weaning to tell?
options: Energy density should exceed that of breastmilk
Begin exactly at age 6 months, no more or less
Breastmilk can be stopped once weaning starts
Introduce various food at a time to enrich nutrition
Encourage bottle rather than cup to increase satiety
e: Konsep TERPENTING dalam MPASI: ENERGY DENSITY (kepadatan energi) MPASI harus LEBIH TINGGI dari ASI.

q: A 8 months old baby presented 2x with tonic clonic generalized seizures following high temperature. Right ear secretion found. What is your first management?
e: PENANGANAN AWAL kejang demam yang sudah berhenti (bayi tidak sedang kejang saat datang): ANTIPIRETIK (paracetamol atau i

q: A neonate born from HIV positive mother. Born vigorously and drinks formula. Mother has been on ART for 1 year. Will you give BCG vaccination?
options: Yes, as the mother has been on ART
No, it can lead to BCG disseminated infection
No, it can lead to tuberculosis disseminated infection
Yes, it is safe as the baby is born vigorously
e: BCG DIKONTRAINDIKASIKAN pada neonatus lahir dari ibu HIV positif karena status HIV bayi belum terkonfirmasi.

q: A 7-year old boy experienced generalized seizure for 2 days, thrice daily, lasting 2-4 minutes, fully conscious after attacks. Remarkable good condition. Possible diagnosis?
e: EPILEPSI: kejang berulang (>=2 kali) tanpa provokasi demam atau infeksi.

q: New Ballard assessment of the baby at 29 weeks old gestational age classified the baby as?
e: Klasifikasi prematuritas berdasarkan usia gestasi (WHO): Extremely preterm <28 minggu;

q: At one minute of age, baby experienced central cyanosis, gasping respiration, heart rate 70, floppy tone and facial grimacing but no crying. APGAR score is?
e: Skor APGAR: 5 komponen masing-masing 0-1-2: (1) Appearance/warna kulit: Central cyanosis = 1.

q: A 2 years old boy had high grade fever for 4 days, red rashes on face spreading to neck and chest. His neighbor was hospitalized due to dyspnea with the same complaint. Most likely diagnosis?
e: CAMPAK (Measles): (1) WABAH (tetangga juga sakit = cluster/KLB, campak sangat menular R0=12-18), (2) Demam tinggi 4 hari

q: A pediatric patient came with red urine. Urine test positive but no erythrocytes detected in high power field. Possible cause?
e: Urin merah TANPA eritrosit di sedimen urin = bukan hematuria sejati.

q: A midwife refers a patient with red urine and swelling both legs. Physical examination shows hypertension. First differential diagnosis?
e: GLOMERULONEFRITIS (GN)/Sindrom Nefritik: TRIAS KLASIK = (1) Hematuria (urin merah/cola-colored), (2) Edema (bengkak kedu

q: A 12 years old girl confirmed having rheumatic heart disease. Which heart valve is most affected?
e: KATUP MITRAL adalah katup yang paling sering terkena pada Penyakit Jantung Rematik.

q: An 8-years-old girl with palpitation. Wide and fixed split S2, ejection systolic murmur at 2nd ICS left parasternal. ECG: RVH. CXR: CTR 0.8 and upward apex. Most likely diagnosis?
e: ASD (Atrial Septal Defect): TANDA KHAS = S2 WIDE AND FIXED SPLIT (tidak berubah dengan pernapasan = PATHOGNOMONIC ASD).

q: A girl, 8 years old, polyuria, polyphagia and polydipsia. No family history of diabetes. Blood glucose 450 mg/dL, HbA1C 15%, C-Peptide 0.1 (low). Diagnosis?
e: DM TIPE 1: C-peptide RENDAH (0.1) adalah KUNCI DIAGNOSIS.

q: A 8 year old girl experienced urticaria hence you prescribed antihistamine. What is the correct statement about antihistamine mechanism?
options: AH inhibits binding of specific IgE
AH stops histamine released by mast cell
AH stops histamine released by dendritic cell
AH inhibits histamine binding to allergen
e: ANTIHISTAMIN: mekanisme kerja = ANTAGONIS KOMPETITIF RESEPTOR HISTAMIN.

q: A 6 years old boy was brought to ER due to repetitive cough. Father reported the boy choked on a pin 2 days before. X-ray: pin in the left bronchus. What is your next plan?
e: BENDA ASING di bronkus dikonfirmasi X-ray = BRONKOSKOPI RIGID adalah prosedur diagnostik sekaligus terapeutik PILIHAN UT

q: Parents brought their yellowish neonate. Kramer 4 jaundice found. What is your pre-assumption for the indirect bilirubin level?
e: Klasifikasi IKTERUS KRAMER: Kramer 1 kepala dan leher = bilirubin ~5-7 mg/dL;

q: You heard a medium pitched high grade continuous murmur best at the pulmonic position, with a harsh machine-like quality that often radiates to the left clavicle. Which congenital heart anomaly?
e: BISING PDA: BISING KONTINU (continuous/machinery murmur) yang terus-menerus sepanjang sistol dan diastol.

q: A boy, 1 year old, WFA z-score +1 SD and BMI for age >+2 SD. According to WHO growth chart 2006, what is your advice?
options: Give all food as low glycemic index
Continue diet and monitor every 3 months
Increase the amount of food intake
Reduce the amount of food intake
e: Interpretasi: WFA +1 SD = berat badan NORMAL. BMI/U >+2 SD = OVERWEIGHT/risiko obesitas.

q: A mother brought her 3 months old baby with specific IgE positive for milk allergy. Which allergy manifestation will be most possible?
e: Pada BAYI USIA 3 BULAN dengan alergi susu sapi IgE-mediated, manifestasi TERSERING dan PALING MUNGKIN adalah EKSEMA/DERM

q: Which is the most common cross-placenta transfer of maternal infection for her baby?
e: SIFILIS (Treponema pallidum) adalah infeksi yang PALING EFISIEN melintas plasenta dengan transmisi vertikal hampir 100%

q: A boy born March 18, 2020 was brought on November 23, 2021 for vaccination, having received complete vaccination including MR first dose at 9 months. What is the live booster vaccine indicated?
e: Usia anak: lahir 18 Maret 2020, datang 23 November 2021 = usia 20 bulan.

q: What is the most important and effective action in neonatal resuscitation?
e: VENTILASI PARU adalah tindakan PALING PENTING dan EFEKTIF dalam resusitasi neonatus.

q: A 3 years old girl with productive cough for 3 weeks. Father diagnosed with TB smear (++). Girl 12 kg, all systems normal. Tuberculin test 13 mm induration. Management?
e: TERAPI TB ANAK tanpa komplikasi. Skor TB: kontak BTA ++ (3 poin) + uji tuberkulin positif (3 poin) + batuk >2 minggu (1

q: Breastmilk is rich in non-specific and specific immunological properties. Which is the SPECIFIC immune found in breastmilk?
e: IgA SEKRETORI (Secretory IgA/sIgA) adalah imunoglobulin SPESIFIK utama dalam ASI.

q: A 9 year old asthmatic patient needs salbutamol daily especially when exercising, and coughing fits awaken her from sleep twice a week. Most appropriate management?
options: Short-acting inhaled beta agonist as needed
Daily leukotriene modifier with short acting beta-agonist
Medium-dose inhaled corticosteroid with short acting beta-agonist
High dose inhaled corticosteroid with theophylline and short acting beta-agonist
Inhaled nedocromil with short acting beta-agonist
e: Klasifikasi GINA: salbutamol HARIAN + batuk malam 2x/minggu = ASMA PERSISTEN SEDANG (Moderate Persistent Asthma).

q: Visual analog scale is a subjective score to measure severity of a problem. In which problem is VAS normally applied?
e: Visual Analog Scale (VAS) untuk NYERI (Pain) adalah penggunaan standar dan tersering.
